text  
bat the historian discovered that the village issued 240 tokens in one year each with a value of 3 pence. she calculated that the total value of the tokens was 240 * 3 = 720 pence. the average purchase was 18 pence, so the number of purchases would be 720 / 18 = 40. the village could make 40 average purchases with the total number of tokens issued.  
P.P.S. lake
